name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly—avoid recorded statements** without lawyer; they twist words.[3]

Request all in writing; don't admit fault.

- Note what you said.
- Get lawyer to handle.
- Correct misquotes.

Damage control: attorney reviews.
